observation: decision-log.jsonl, evidence-graph.jsonl, symbol-graph.jsonl, component-graph.jsonl, and ARTIFACT_INDEX.jsonl returned 404 before bootstrap.

The normalized projection satisfies all required properties, additionalProperties constraints, reference object shapes, edge shapes, enums, stable-ID patterns, confidence bounds, rollback object shape, and next-handoff object shape defined by fi-schema:session-manifest:v1. No schema violations were found. Source and projection remained unchanged.

observation: The immutable historical session used string arrays, untyped connected-object lists, string conflicts, an array rollback route, and a string next handoff. A separate schema-v1 projection was created with explicit per-reference provenance, typed symbol/component references, structured edges, conflicts, writes, rollback, and handoff. The source manifest was not modified.

observation: The validation audit existed durably but was absent from the artifact registry and evidence graph. This run registered the exact audit stable ID using its canonical path, commit provenance, and blob SHA; no artifact identity was inferred from filename or prose similarity.

The historical session fi-session:2026-07-17t040736-0400 already satisfies the canonical SESSION_MANIFEST schema. A duplicate normalized projection was not created. The migration was reconciled as a no-op and the immutable source was preserved.
